ogTitle: Umina Beach vs Unanderra: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Umina Beach and Unanderra.
heading: Umina Beach vs Unanderra — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Umina Beach, New South Wales and Unanderra, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Umina Beach has a lower overall climate risk score (40/100) compared to Unanderra (45/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Umina Beach or Unanderra safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Umina Beach has a flood risk score of 40/100, while Unanderra scores 47/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Umina Beach scores 35/100 for bushfire risk. Unanderra scores 55/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Umina Beach or Unanderra?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Umina Beach has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.2% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
